steps.title: Identify the constant term
steps.content: In $W(x)=5x+75$, the term $5x$ is the watering time for $x$ plants. The constant term is the time that does not depend on the number of plants.

steps.title: Set plants watered to zero
steps.content: To isolate the hedge-trimming time, evaluate the function at $x=0$: $$ W(0)=5(0)+75=75 $$ The answer is 75.
